name: vision
description: Vision researches, goal-sets, resumes, orchestrates, verifies, and delivers engineering work with bounded roles and acceptance-linked evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Research-first goals, deterministic resume, and evidence.
interface.longDescription: Vision is a portable Codex workflow for authority-neutral work-environment profiles, calibrated read-only discovery, contract-bound persistent goals, deterministic lifecycle recovery, bounded project-scoped roles, Beads-backed execution, direct risk gates, current-attempt advisory review, real-service checks when relevant, protected verification, and distinct delivery-controller bindings.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $vision to reconcile the work-environment profile and any active contract or goal, research unresolved facts with calibrated read-only scouts when useful, freeze and validate the evidence-backed contract, create the exact canonical persistent goal, activate deterministic lifecycle state, execute bounded slices with advisory review, and continue until the honest verified completion target is reached or a configured blocker requires user action.
